purpose: Prevent another failed 21-sprite batch by proving native source size, alpha, crop safety, identity lock, outfit drift, and app-scale readability in order.
globalPromptLocks: Otis Vale, approved soft Santa concierge identity, threshold keeper for The Tower lobby
lived-in human warmth, slight belly, natural imperfections, kind tired eyes, relaxed uneven shoulders
premium clean web-game raster sprite, simple matte materials, restrained burgundy and brass concierge palette
full body, centered, safe transparent padding, no crop, no background, no text
mobile-safe gesture, CharacterStage-compatible posture, lobby-compatible dramatic lighting
stopRules: Stop immediately if a probe source has long edge below 4096 px.
Stop immediately if the source lacks true alpha and has no perfectly flat removable chroma background.
Stop if a probe repeats prior non-flat chroma or missing-alpha failures.
Stop if Otis identity changes across seasonal outfit probes.
Do not generate the full 21-sprite pack until probes 1 through 3 pass source preflight and visual QA.

probes.goal: Prove GPT Image 2 can produce the canonical Otis source at native 4K-class resolution with true alpha.
probes.promptAddendum: calm grounded idle pose, hands visible and relaxed near concierge vest/cardigan, slight belly readable, no prop required
requiredChecks: true alpha or perfectly flat chroma
probes.onFailure: Stop full-pack generation and switch source strategy.

probes.goal: Stress-test mobile-safe hand gesture and finger quality.
probes.promptAddendum: small warm greeting gesture, one hand raised modestly within frame, fingers clean, posture still grounded
requiredChecks: gesture width fits 170 x 290 display frame
probes.onFailure: Revise gesture framing before generating any other hand-forward poses.

probes.goal: Stress-test restrained ledger/keycard prop handling, prop edges, and crop safety.
probes.promptAddendum: holding or consulting a small guest ledger and keycard ring, props restrained, hands and prop corners fully inside padding
requiredChecks: prop does not hide face or belly silhouette
probes.onFailure: Do not generate alert/thinking/talking until prop/crop framing is fixed.

probes.goal: Prove seasonal outfit variant preserves identity and does not become casual/resort-coded.
probes.promptAddendum: lighter seasonal concierge vest/cardigan treatment, still burgundy anchored, brass restrained, same face, same slight belly
requiredChecks: same face and body as regular
probes.onFailure: Lock outfit edit prompts against regular identity reference before seasonal batch.

probes.goal: Prove winter layering preserves identity without becoming Santa or a coat-heavy blob.
probes.promptAddendum: layered winter concierge treatment, scarf or overcoat detail restrained, same face, same belly and posture, no holiday costume
requiredChecks: same face and body as regular
probes.onFailure: Rewrite winter outfit prompt and re-probe before generating any winter poses.

probes.goal: Stress-test expression readability and warm overprepared comedy at app scale.
probes.promptAddendum: warm overprepared explanation, small self-correcting expression, mouth and hand readable but not theatrical
probes.onFailure: Generate alternate talking and alert probes before completing regular outfit.

probes.goal: Confirm alert can read as gentle concierge urgency without panic or guard energy.
probes.promptAddendum: subtle one-moment alert, concerned but calm, one hand near keycard or bell, no panic, no stern security posture
requiredChecks: silhouette remains stable for CharacterStage alert motion
probes.onFailure: Keep alert out of the full pack until expression direction is stabilized.

allowedAfter: at least one seasonal idle probe passes identity comparison
